title: Google Search adds Gemini 3.5 Flash, Search agents and an AI-powered search box
friendlyTitle: Google Search is getting more AI agent features
summary: Google detailed Search updates built around AI Mode, including Gemini 3.5 Flash as the default model, a redesigned AI-powered search box, follow-ups from AI Overviews and background Search agents. The company says AI Mode has surpassed one billion monthly users.
friendlySummary: Google is adding more AI features to Search, including a stronger model, a smarter search box and agents that can watch for useful information.
whyItMatters: Search is becoming less like a static results page and more like a workspace for asking, refining and delegating information tasks. For daily users, this could make research, booking, comparison shopping and monitoring tasks more automated—but it also raises the bar for checking sources.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make everyday searching more helpful, but people should still check the links and sources behind the answers.
